title: Vanilla Better Enchanting Table
description: A vanila-like texture to make the enchanting table better
body:
[![Modrinth - My other projects](https://img.shields.io/badge/modrinth-My_other_projects-00AF5C?style=for-the-badge&logo=modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/user/Jacosvaldo) [![Discord - Jacosvaldo's Not Too Cool Server](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Jacosvaldo%27s%20_Not_Too_Cool_Server-5865F2?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord)](https://discord.com/invite/cPYyf3JqgU) [![Kofi - Tip me](https://img.shields.io/badge/kofi-Tip_me-F26B2E?style=for-the-badge&logo=kofi)](https://ko-fi.com/jacosvaldo) ## ✨ Better Texture!!! ![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uE1RvdVA/images/07711e911b82b4db241ba4caaa742aee1997acf9.gif](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uE1RvdVA/images/07711e911b82b4db241ba4caaa742aee1997acf9.gif) **
Check the gallery for more samples!!!
** --- ## 🧩 Dependencies No mod is actually required, but **OptiFine** or [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) are needed to enable emissive (glowing) textures. ![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uE1RvdVA/images/82c4adf65756bc04ef29ec18ce253b932508d806.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uE1RvdVA/images/82c4adf65756bc04ef29ec18ce253b932508d806.png) --- ## 💡 Tips & Compatibility ✅ Compatible with [Enchanting Table Magic Circle](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/enchanting-table-magic-circle/settings) ![https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uE1RvdVA/images/2792f98526750ff8607d001918ccc7b58b6d9f20.png](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/uE1RvdVA/images/2792f98526750ff8607d001918ccc7b58b6d9f20.png) 💠 If that's not enough for you try [Better Enchanting Table](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/better-enchanting-table) ![Better Enchanting Table Resourcepack](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d2cb923b69bb2671dca13095dbdf998c61f91864.png) --- ## 💼 My works [![Use code JACOS for 25% discount at Sparked Host servers](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c027e7de8616ac177d4267980d53eaacfa9e2022_0.webp)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3074)
